shellCommands.command: pwd && rg -n "deepEqual|deep equal|DeepEqual" src tests scripts package.json | head -200 && git status --short
find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -200 && grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git "deepEqual" src tests 2>/dev/null | head -200

sed -n '1,180p' src/utils/deepEqual.ts && printf '
--- tests ---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/__tests__/utils/deepEqual.test.ts && printf '
--- package scripts ---
' && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))"
sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/isObject.ts && sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/isPrimitive.ts && sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/isPlainObject.ts && git log -8 --oneline -- src/utils/deepEqual.ts
grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git "deepEqual(.*," src | head -80 && grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git "WeakMap\|WeakSet" src/utils src/logic | head -80
